query:
ALTER TABLE affiliates 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commissionRateLevel1 DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.30,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commissionRateLevel2 DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.10,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commissionRateLevel3 DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.05,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS earningsLevel1 INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS earningsLevel2 INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS earningsLevel3 INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS level2Referrals INT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS level3Referrals INT DEFAULT 0;
